name: Push-up
description: Classic bodyweight push-up for chest, shoulders and triceps.
cues: Keep body straight, core braced, lower chest to floor.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Squat holding a dumbbell at chest level. Great for beginners learning squat pattern.
cues: Elbows inside knees, chest up, sit back.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Lying dumbbell press targeting chest and triceps.
cues: Wrists stacked over elbows, full range, controlled descent.

name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: Bent-over single arm row for upper back and lats.
cues: Hinge at hips, pull elbow back, squeeze shoulder blade.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
description: Standing or seated press overhead for shoulders and triceps.
cues: Core tight, no excessive arch, press to lockout.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
description: Hip hinge movement targeting hamstrings and glutes.
cues: Soft knees, hinge at hips, flat back, feel stretch in hamstrings.

name: Resistance Band Face Pull
description: Band pull to face for rear delts and upper back posture.
cues: Elbows high, externally rotate at end, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Plank
description: Isometric core hold.
cues: Body straight from head to heels, squeeze glutes and abs.

name: Glute Bridge
description: Lying hip extension for glutes and hamstrings.
cues: Drive through heels, squeeze glutes at top, 2 sec hold.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Rear-foot elevated split squat. Excellent unilateral leg strength.
cues: Front knee tracks over ankle, upright torso, controlled depth.

name: Bodyweight Squat
description: Foundational air squat building lower-body strength with no equipment.
cues: Feet shoulder-width, sit hips back, knees track over toes, chest tall.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Alternating forward lunges that train legs and balance using bodyweight.
cues: Step long, drop back knee toward floor, push through front heel, stay upright.

name: Mountain Climber
description: Dynamic plank with alternating knee drives for core and conditioning.
cues: Shoulders over wrists, flat back, drive knees quickly without bouncing hips.

name: Burpee
description: Full-body conditioning move combining a squat, plank and jump.
cues: Hands down, jump back to plank, jump in, then explode up tall.

name: Bicycle Crunch
description: Rotational crunch targeting the abs and obliques.
cues: Rotate from the torso, opposite elbow to knee, keep lower back pressed down.

name: Pike Push-up
description: Inverted push-up that shifts load to the shoulders for a vertical press pattern.
cues: Hips high in an A-shape, lower crown of head toward floor, elbows tracking back.

name: Superman
description: Prone back extension strengthening the lower back and glutes.
cues: Lift arms and legs together, squeeze glutes, keep neck neutral, no jerking.

name: Standing Calf Raise
description: Bodyweight heel raise that builds the calves and ankle strength.
cues: Rise onto the balls of the feet, full pause at the top, lower slowly under control.

name: Pull-up
description: Overhand vertical pull for back, lats and biceps using a bar.
cues: Start from a dead hang, pull chest to bar, control the descent fully.

name: Chin-up
description: Underhand vertical pull emphasizing the biceps and lats.
cues: Supinated grip, lead with the chest, squeeze biceps at top, no swinging.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hanging core movement that targets the lower abs and hip flexors.
cues: Avoid swinging, raise legs with control, posteriorly tilt the pelvis at the top.

name: Barbell Back Squat
description: Barbell squat with the bar on the upper back, a foundational leg builder.
cues: Brace the core, break at hips and knees, drive through midfoot, knees out.

name: Barbell Deadlift
description: Hip-hinge pull lifting a loaded barbell from the floor for total posterior chain strength.
cues: Flat back, bar over midfoot, push the floor away, lock out with glutes.

name: Barbell Bench Press
description: Flat barbell press, the primary horizontal pushing strength movement for the chest.
cues: Retract shoulder blades, lower to mid-chest, drive feet, controlled tempo, use a spotter.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
description: Bent-over barbell row that builds the mid-back, lats and biceps.
cues: Hinge to about 45 degrees, flat back, pull to lower ribs, squeeze the blades.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
description: Standing barbell press overhead developing shoulder and triceps strength.
cues: Brace the core, keep ribs down, press the bar in a straight line, finish overhead.

name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
description: Standing dumbbell curl isolating the biceps.
cues: Keep elbows pinned to the sides, curl without swinging, lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Standing raise to the side that isolates the lateral deltoids for shoulder width.
cues: Slight elbow bend, lead with the elbows, raise to shoulder height, no shrugging.

name: Resistance Band Pull-Apart
description: Horizontal band pull that strengthens the upper back and rear delts for posture.
cues: Arms straight at chest height, pull the band apart, squeeze the shoulder blades together.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Cable machine vertical pull that targets the lats and upper back.
cues: Tall chest, pull the bar to the upper chest, drive the elbows down, control the return.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
description: Cable extension that isolates the triceps.
cues: Elbows pinned to the sides, extend fully to lockout, resist on the way up.

name: Treadmill Interval Run
description: Alternating hard and easy running bouts on a treadmill for fat loss and endurance.
cues: Warm up first, drive arms, land midfoot, recover at an easy pace between sprints.

name: Rowing Machine
description: Full-body cardio on an erg that drives legs, back and arms for endurance and fat loss.
cues: Sequence legs then hips then arms, keep a flat back, return arms then hips then legs.
